<mxGeometry x="300" y="260" width="200" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kbFu5xCgorl0r84Owzoj-3" value="<font face="Lucida Console"><span style="font-size: 14px;">CRC16</span></font>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="260" width="70" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kbFu5xCgorl0r84Owzoj-4" value="<h2><font face="Lucida Console">Binary Packet Definition</font></h2>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Lucida Console;fontSize=14;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="485" y="340" width="100" height="30" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Lucida Console;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="325" y="340" width="150" height="50" as="geometry" />
